templates.name: Minimal
templates.description: Kernel + one host adapter + an init entry point. The smallest publishable harness.
templates.quickStart: The bare scaffold — learn the system, then grow into a vertical.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Health-check the harness: kernel load, MCP wiring, memory backend, host adapter.

templates.name: DevOps / SRE

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Health-check the harness: kernel load, MCP wiring, memory backend, host adapter.

templates.name: Advanced Coding
templates.description: A senior engineering pod — architect, implementer, reviewer, and test-writer over a shared code memory.
templates.harnessDesc: Plan, implement, review, and test code changes
templates.quickStart: Architect → implement → review → test, with a code-index MCP and push-guarded git perms.

agents.name: Architect
agents.role: Designs the change before code is written.

agents.name: Implementer
agents.role: Writes code that matches the surrounding style.

agents.name: Reviewer
agents.role: Hunts correctness bugs in the diff.

agents.name: Test Writer
agents.role: Adds the missing tests for the change.

skills.name: plan-change
skills.description: Turn a feature request into a minimal, file-level implementation plan before any code.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Health-check the harness: kernel load, MCP wiring, memory backend, host adapter.

commands.name: review-diff
commands.description: Review the current working diff for correctness, security, and reuse.

templates.name: Research Dossiers

templates.harnessDesc: Fan-out research and produce cited dossiers
templates.quickStart: Scout → search → grade → synthesize → fact-check → cite, with web-search & dossier MCPs.

agents.name: Web Searcher
agents.role: Fans out searches and collects sources.

agents.name: Synthesizer
agents.role: Writes the dossier from the evidence.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Health-check the harness: kernel load, MCP wiring, memory backend, host adapter.

templates.name: Trading Desk

templates.quickStart: Watch → signal → risk-gate → execute (paper) → postmortem, with circuit-breaker safety.

commands.description: Health-check the harness: kernel load, MCP wiring, memory backend, host adapter.

templates.name: Legal Redline
templates.description: Legal review harness — redline, citation-checker, risk-rater; citation-search MCP and a deliberation-first workflow. Drafts only; not legal advice.

agents.name: Strategist
